'''Horgo Shive''' was a [[Muun/Legends|Muun]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] for the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] and particularly favored [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|''Hailfire'' droids]] when conquering new [[Planet/Legends|planets]].

{{Char-stub}}
